headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Otis Worldwide (OTIS) After The Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Otis Worldwide at around US$77.86 is pricing in too much pessimism or leaving some value on the table, you are in the right place. The stock has seen a 2.5% gain over the last 7 days, set against a 14.1% decline over 30 days and a 16.5% decline over the past year, which raises fair questions about how the current price lines up with the underlying business. Recent coverage has focused on Otis Worldwide as an established player in elevators and escalators,...

headline: Assessing Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What recent performance says about Otis Worldwide (OTIS) Otis Worldwide (OTIS) has seen its share price slip over the past month and past 3 months, with returns of roughly 14% and 11% declines, prompting investors to reassess the elevator and escalator specialist. See our latest analysis for Otis Worldwide.
